name: Equity Residential
description: Equity Residential is a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the acquisition, development, and management of high-quality apartment properties in leading U.S. growth markets. The company owns and operates a diverse portfolio of residential communities located in desirable urban and high-density suburban locations, including Boston, New York, Washington, D.C., Seattle, San Francisco, Southern California, Denver, Atlanta, Dallas/Fort Worth, and Austin. Equity Residential is committed to providing an exceptional living experience for its residents while delivering long-term value to its shareholders.
